name: Real Estate Rush
author: Poki
description: Real Estate Rush is an idle game where you're destined to become the ultimate real estate tycoon! Seize the opportunity to buy low and sell high as you navigate the fluctuating housing market. Grow your empire by reinvesting your earnings, and travel around the world to buy all the monuments. Strategically boost your stats along the way to gain a competitive edge. How vast will your real estate empire become? How to play Real Estate Rush? Click or tap to buy and sell houses. Who created Real Estate Rush? Real Estate Rush is created by Okashi Games. Play their other games on Poki: Karakuri , MicroWars , Rolling Jump , Nano War , Kawaii Fruits 3D and Park Out ! How can I play Real Estate Rush for free? You can play Real Estate Rush for free on Poki. Can I play Real Estate Rush on mobile devices and desktop? Real Estate Rush can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
